name: Bound Survivor
short_description: Bound Survivor is a 2D pixel top-down roguelike action game. Combine weapons with “bond” tags to trigger powerful synergies and create your own combat style. Every run offers fresh challenges!
detailed_description:
Equip, Combine, and Push Beyond Your Limits!

Bound Survivor is a fast-paced, satisfying 2D pixel-art top-down roguelike action game.
In a battlefield swarming with monsters, you can equip multiple weapons—each with unique bounds. Combine different bounds to trigger powerful synergies and craft your own wild build!

  • Permanent Progression: Every run is a fresh challenge where luck and strategy go hand in hand.

  • Free Weapon Loadouts: Break free from fixed builds—dual-wield machine guns, or mix fireballs with blade storms. It’s your call.

  • Bound Combination System: Build powerful synergies just like in auto battlers. Different setups, different playstyles.

  • Retro Pixel Art: Explosive effects, chaotic battles, and nostalgic visuals—classic feel, modern flair.

Find order in chaos. Survive the endless waves.
How long can your weapon combo hold out?
